global_description: A small, slender songbird with an olive-green back and pale underparts. It features a grayish head with a distinctive white eyebrow stripe and a thin, pointed bill. The wings are short and rounded, with subtle wing bars.

part_details.head: Grayish with a prominent white eyebrow stripe above the eye.
part_details.underparts: Pale, almost white, with a clean appearance.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded with subtle wing bars.
part_details.bill: Thin, pointed, suitable for insect feeding.

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye on the grayish head.
The olive-green back transitions into pale underparts.
The thin pointed bill extends from the front of the head.
